description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist design, featuring a combination of stone and wood paneling on its exterior walls. The structure is set on a rectangular plot with a paved surface and is surrounded by several tall, leafy trees on one side and slender coniferous trees on the other. Large windows are present on the front and side facades, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The entrance is marked by a small concrete step and a covered area, while the rear of the building is more enclosed with fewer openings. The overall aesthetic is clean and contemporary, with a focus on geometric lines and open space.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with stone and wood exterior, large windows, and surrounded by both leafy and coniferous trees on a paved lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the stone facade, main entrance, and a row of tall coniferous trees to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large windows, wood paneling, and leafy trees behind the bungalow, with two human figures visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the more enclosed stone wall and the continuation of the coniferous trees.
description_view_3: View dominated by the leafy trees, with the bungalow mostly obscured behind them.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
